parents.subject: LU-19234 lst: Fix leak under emitter/parser delete (1)

commit.subject: LU-19229 ptlrpc: class_add_nids_to_uuid() allow many NIDs
commit.message:
LU-19229 ptlrpc: class_add_nids_to_uuid() allow many NIDs

Currently class_add_nids_to_uuid() fails if NID list has
more than 32 NIDs, allow it to accept big lists and just
skip tail that doesn't fit

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2de516cf6e6f8127158b7bfd2aeb4e6e1f4a054d
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60548
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
